query_title: Through My Window: Across the Sea

recommendations.title: Sex Appeal
recommendations.overview: Avery, a teenager with a tendency towards perfectionism, enlists her friend Larson to help her prepare for her first time with her long-distance boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Sweet & Sour
recommendations.overview: Faced with real-world opportunities and challenges, a couple endures the highs and lows of trying to make a long-distance relationship survive.

recommendations.title: Under the Amalfi Sun
recommendations.overview: A year after their romance began in Riccione, Vincenzo and Camilla reunite for a vacation on the picturesque Amalfi Coast and put their love to the test.

recommendations.title: The Kissing Booth 2
recommendations.overview: With college decisions looming, Elle juggles her long-distance romance with Noah, changing relationship with bestie Lee and feelings for a new classmate.

recommendations.title: Happiness for Beginners
recommendations.overview: At a crossroads after her divorce, a schoolteacher ventures toward a fresh start in life — and love — when she signs up for a grueling group hiking trip.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Kuch Kuch Hota Hai
recommendations.overview: Per her mother's last wish, an 8 year old girl sets out to reunite her father with his college best friend who was in love with him.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
recommendations.overview: Mr. Bean wins a trip to Cannes where he unwittingly separates a young boy from his father and must help the two reunite. On the way he discovers France, bicycling and true love, among other things.
Two university students gain insight into life and love as they get to know each other during a road trip across Europe.
